summary: Preserved the latest TestFlight retry screenshots. The installed app reports Owlory 0.2.0 (20260513172951), but Build Info shows the archive was stamped from de320a7dd2c38878df3343ae3f945df9ffb8f815-dirty with GitStatus dirty. The stamped base commit's committed project.pbxproj has CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION 20260417081904, so the archive was produced from uncommitted local build-number state. A Continue surface screenshot was preserved as context, but no testflight-verified proof is claimed because the Build Info gate failed first.
validations_failed: Build Info gate: Git status is dirty, so the TestFlight proof lane stops before Continue proof.

contract_status_changes.before: The user installed a TestFlight build and airdropped Build Info, TestFlight listing, and Continue screenshots.
contract_status_changes.after: The screenshots prove the installed TestFlight build is not eligible for testflight-verified proof because Build Info reports GitStatus dirty and a de320a7...-dirty source stamp.

contract_status_changes.before: A Continue surface screenshot was available from TestFlight.
contract_status_changes.after: The screenshot is preserved as context only; no Continue TestFlight proof is claimed because the provenance gate failed first.

residual_risks: The current TestFlight install was archived from dirty local state and cannot be used as release-channel behavior proof.
No valid TestFlight Continue surface proof was captured.
A new TestFlight archive must be produced from clean committed source after the build-number bump is committed.
recommended_next_reason: Retry only after installing a TestFlight build whose Build Info shows GitStatus clean and whose build number matches the committed project.pbxproj at the stamped commit.
